title: bicornella ochyrae
intro: Bicornella ochyrae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family, which is native to New Caledonia. It is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bicornella ochyrae include its use as a treatment for various ailments, including fever reduction and skin infections, thanks to its active compounds. Herbal preparations of Bicornella ochyrae often involve the leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and other remedies.
